title: centaurea × brosseana
intro: Centaurea × brosseana, also known as Centaurea brosseana, is a hybrid plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is believed to be a cross between Centaurea cyanus and Centaurea hybrida. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Centaurea × brosseana include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from respiratory issues. Centaurea × brosseana can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
